3rd Party.name: 3rd Party
3rd Party.description: Are 3rd Party Questionnaires and/or OEB_CSF_Governance_Templates completed and overall threat and risk analysis meet acceptable risk standards?

Data Type.name: Data Type
Data Type.description: Is the type of data deemed sensitive? (i.e. Customer, Employee, Financial)

Privacy Impact Assessment.name: Privacy Impact Assessment
Privacy Impact Assessment.description: Has a Privacy Impact Assessment been completed?

Assurances/Attestation.name: Assurances/Attestation
Assurances/Attestation.description:
3rd Party Assurances or Attestation provided through one of the following:
ISO 27001; Proof of conformance to an Information Security Management System
SOC 2 Type II
Privacy Shield
Data Privacy Addendum that confroms to a relevant privacy standard
CSA Consensus Assessment Initiatve Questionnaire completed
Penetration Testing
Other?

Cybersecurity Requirements Spreadsheet.name: Cybersecurity Requirements Spreadsheet
Cybersecurity Requirements Spreadsheet.description: Has the Baseline Cybersecurity Requirements spreadsheet been completed and results show satisfactory complliance?

Security Awareness.name: Security Awareness
Security Awareness.description: Supporting documentation demonstrating cybersecurity practice provided such as Cybersecurity Policy, Privacy Policy, Incident Management Plan, etc.. or Other relevant documentation.

Business Continuity.name: Business Continuity
Business Continuity.description: Are business continuity and disaster recovery plans established and subject to testing at planned intervals?

Incident History.name: Incident History
Incident History.description: Have any past public cybersecurity and privacy incidents occured such as privacy breach, ransomware, other infilitration?

Contract Assurances.name: Contract Assurances
Contract Assurances.description: Does the vendor use Strong Cybersecurity & Privacy Language in the Contract? Do they use our Contract template?

Incident Management.name: Incident Management
Incident Management.description: Are Incident Management plans present and regularly tested (incident response plans)?

Supply Chain Security.name: Supply Chain Security
Supply Chain Security.description: Is Cybersecurity Supply Chain management present and do 3rd parties adhere to same rigor and responsibility?

Information Security Governance.name: Information Security Governance
Information Security Governance.description: Are Cybersecurity controls in place and do they provide the necessary level of due diligence to protect the confidentiaility, integrity and availability of Hydro Ottawa data?

General Security Awareness.name: General Security Awareness
General Security Awareness.description: Is Security Awareness training built into the organizational culture?

Cybersecurity Governance.name: Cybersecurity Governance
Cybersecurity Governance.description: Is there a Governance program present and does it incorporate Cybersecurity?

Personnel Security & Ethics Compliance.name: Personnel Security & Ethics Compliance
Personnel Security & Ethics Compliance.description: Is there an employee code of conduct or ethics compliance part of organization training? Does it require attestation?

Bitsight Rating.name: Bitsight Rating
Bitsight Rating.description: Is the vendor's Bitsight Rating within an acceptable score? 760 out of 820 is very good, 750 is low risk, 730 is acceptable, 700 is high risk.

Software Development Life Cycle.name: Software Development Life Cycle
Software Development Life Cycle.description: Is SDLC in place and part of software development processes?

Insider Risk Management.name: Insider Risk Management
Insider Risk Management.description: Does an Insider Threat Program exist?

IT Change Control.name: IT Change Control
IT Change Control.description: Does a Change Management Policy exist?

Data Loss Prevention.name: Data Loss Prevention
Data Loss Prevention.description: Does a Data loss prevention practice exist?

Security Breach Notification.name: Security Breach Notification
Security Breach Notification.description: Does a Breach notification process exist?
